title: etlingera subterranea
intro: Etlingera subterranea, also known as the underground torch ginger, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its rhizome and roots. The health benefits of Etlingera subterranea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Etlingera subterranea can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
